message:
fix(onboard): improve mktemp portability for macOS and BSD

Uses TMPDIR environment variable with /tmp fallback, and adds
fallback path using $$ if mktemp fails entirely. Fixes issues
on systems where mktemp behaves differently.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ mark_completed() {
 
     if command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
         local tmp
-        tmp=$(mktemp)
+        tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/acfs_onboard.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null) || tmp="/tmp/acfs_onboard_temp.$"
         jq --argjson lesson "$lesson" '
             .completed = (.completed + [$lesson] | unique | sort) |
             .current = (if $lesson < 8 then $lesson + 1 else $lesson end) |
@@ -172,7 +172,7 @@ set_current() {
 
     if command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
         local tmp
-        tmp=$(mktemp)
+        tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/acfs_onboard.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null) || tmp="/tmp/acfs_onboard_temp.$$"
         jq --argjson lesson "$lesson" '
             .current = $lesson |
             .last_accessed = now | todate
